description: Validation matrix F7 · Open-source devtool with paid tier. Expected: GitHub required, content+community agents active, PLG+community unique pattern.

mocked_enrichment.company_context: Open-source CLI tool for database migrations. Free for individuals, $49/dev/mo for teams with cloud sync and access control. 12k GitHub stars, 180 paying teams, $42k MRR. Community-led growth via GitHub and Twitter.
